case_title: CHEMICAL BANK, A CORP. vs. LAM, EDWIN et al

ORDER RE: WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED - DENIED. INSUFFICIENT GOOD CAUSE. (ORDER RETURNED TO PLTF, ORIGINAL DECLARATION KEPT FOR FILE)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEMICAL BANK, A CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, EDWIN $658.78 PRINCIPAL, $124.72 INTEREST, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $913.50 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
